prompt: A cinematic, wide-angle photo of an adventure motorcyclist and two loaded touring bikes parked on a scenic mountain overlook. The asphalt road beneath them features a glowing, golden holographic overlay map of India. This sci-fi HUD (Heads-Up Display) overlay explicitly displays route lines, state borders, and glowing digital text showing GPS navigation metrics like "Ahmedabad to Goa", "20 hr 56 min (1,091 km)", and travel statistics boards. The overall vibe is futuristic travel meets rugged outdoor exploration, featuring high-contrast tones and realistic overcast daylight
